objective: Find and verify a component-source family that breaks the Wave 49/50 value-unique capacity ceiling and reaches rpf20 exact-support selection.
non_negotiables: Capacity-only atlas entries must remain separate from current-selection reports.
The mixed-hook source counts as progress only if it raises component_value_capacity_upper_bound beyond 14 and the selector reaches selected_row_count=60.
The ordered all-atlas truncation probe must not be treated as a failed mixed-hook source; it documents pattern-limit ordering risk.
This wave is still a support report, not a promoted exact shard. The next wave must materialize, schema-validate, replay, split, and baseline the mixed-hook exact shard before model claims.

tasks.prompt: Add a source-atlas report and mixed-hook upper-bound report that compare same-color geometry extensions with mixed-color opposing-pawn/minor hooks.
outputs: Regression tests for the mixed-hook capacity escape and small selector smoke
acceptance: The atlas reports mixed_color_hook_v0 capacity 60 with 113 left and 204 right unique component values.
The atlas reports corner_plus_edge_plus_mixed_color_hook_v0 capacity 60 with 115 left and 208 right unique component values.
The rpf20 mixed-hook upper-bound report selects 60 rows, balanced 20/20/20 by topology family.
The report keeps ordered_all_atlas_truncation_probe_v0 separate from the mixed-hook source.

tasks.prompt: Run the Wave 51 capacity atlas and record the hash.
acceptance: The ordered all-atlas truncation probe is documented as a pattern-limit ordering risk.

tasks.prompt: Run the full rpf20 mixed-hook upper-bound report and record the hash.
acceptance: The report keeps this as support evidence, not a promoted exact shard.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 51 as the first source-family breakthrough for value-unique rpf20 support and route the next wave toward materialized exact-shard audits.
acceptance: Docs state that mixed-color hooks break the current component-value support ceiling.
Docs do not present the selector report as a promoted shard or model result.
Docs route Wave 52 to materialize, replay, split, and baseline the mixed-hook exact shard.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_51_mixed_hook_value_source_breakthrough.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 51 plan is internally consistent.
The mixed-hook source reaches balanced rpf20 value-unique support.
